sourceSummary.oneLine: Approval and inspection package for MI63-02984A SHEET-E2X_BACK_DECOSHEET used with the 2G Detector.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports part approval, inspection criteria, process quality control, packaging, reliability testing, and outgoing inspection for the specified part.
keyPoints: Document code and SEC code are MI63-02984A, with description SHEET-E2X_BACK_DECOSHEET.
Model is listed as 2G Detector and vendor/manufacturer is HANSUNG P&I or 한성피앤아이.
Approval review conclusion states approved and 판정 합격.
Dimensional specifications include 87.70 ±0.15 mm width and 47.40 ±0.15 mm length.
XRF and hazardous substance checks are required to be below specified limits.

entities.name: Samsung Electronics Co.
entities.evidence: This is the asset of Samsung Electronics Co. and it is prohibited from copying and application without permission.

entities.name: Health&Medical Equipment DR R&D Group
entities.evidence: PROPOSAL DIVISION: Health&Medical Equipment DR R&D Group

evidence.claim: The document identifies MI63-02984A as the document code for SHEET-E2X_BACK_DECOSHEET.
The part applies to the 2G Detector model.
The document revision is 00 and the editor designation is ED00.
The package includes an approval decision of approved and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: 결   론,  승 인 함,,,    판   정,합 격

evidence.claim: The dimensional specifications are 87.70 ±0.15 mm and 47.40 ±0.15 mm.
The material review lists matte PC 0.254T.
Tape specification is ST-9108 and tape thickness is 100㎛.
The part must not contain substances specified in 00Q2-0083K.
evidence.evidenceText: This parts should not contain any substances which are specified in 00Q2-0083K

evidence.claim: Outgoing inspection references DUQ1-0022K as the inspection method.
The reliability test was a high-temperature and high-humidity test with pass result.
Reliability test conditions were 50℃, 95% humidity, and 24 hours.
The PQCP control plan category is SOP.
evidence.evidenceText: Control Plan Category,,,,”□ DVS, □ PVS, □ PRS, ■ SOP”

evidence.claim: The packing unit is 1 box × 10 pack × 500, totaling 5,000 EA.

reviewFlags.reason: Authority is not a government regulator; source appears to be an internal Samsung/vendor approval and inspection package.
Multiple dates appear in the source, including E.D DATE 22-10-2018, 작성일 2018.08.14, EC date 10/22/18, PQCP Date(Rev.) 2019-01-04, and reliability test dates.
Form Number field is present but blank; only Form Version values 02 and 00 are visible.
Source text is spreadsheet-derived with mixed Korean and English layout, so some table relationships may be ambiguous.
